full_text:
Plan for sample S125 culturing,

Cell count:

total: 1.96 E6

live: 1.25 E6

viability: 63.6 %

size: 7.7 um

Total cell count: 2.03 / ml x 5 = 10.15

! Pre-coat all the wells with omentum-gel:

30-40 uL for 48-well plates and 8 uL for 96-wells !

A) RNA/DNA extraction + FFPE sample (4 drops):

48-well plate

DNA/RNA + FFPE: 34 wells x 40 µl x = 1700 µl

2000 cells/µl = 3.40E6 cells

→ make 2 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 850 µl each

volume to take from cell suspension:

cells in medium → 837

ome-gel → 120 µl

aprotinin → 2.6 µl

thrombin → 2.6 µl

fibrinogen → 17 µl

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 350 uL medium

B) Drug treatment for flow:

48-well plate

9 conditions x 6 wells/condition = 54 wells

54 wells x 50 µl = 2700 µl,

2000 cells/µl = 5.40E6 cells

→ make 3 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 900 µl each

volume to take from cell suspension:

cells in medium →

ome-gel → 127 µl

aprotinin → 2.7 µl

thrombin → 2.7 µl

fibrinogen → 18 µl

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 300 uL medium

Sample ID: S125_pOme

total: 2.10 E6

live: 1.39 E6

viability: 66.1 %

size: 7.8 um

C) Drug treatment for IF:

96-well U plate

96 wells

96 wells x 10 µl = 432 µl → make 1 mL

2000 cells/µl = 2.00E6 cells

→ make 1 x 1.5 ml eppendorf

volume to take from cell suspension:

cells in medium → 985

ome-gel → 141 µl

aprotinin → 3 µl

thrombin → 3 µl

fibrinogen → 20 µl

→ Let it solidify for 30 min - add 150 uL medium

D) Sample for Flow - Day 0

→ Collect 3.0E6 cells per 900 uL flow staining buffer

1.48 mL

E) Sample for cryo

→ Collect cells per 1 mL stemcell banker

Prepare:

Medium

needed 350 uL x 34 = 11.9 mL

54 x 300 uL = 16.2 mL

54 x 150 uL = 8.1 mL ~ 40 mL

Omegel needed = 691.5 uL

aprotinin = 14.8 uL

thrombin = 14.8 uL

fibrinogen = 98 uL

Drug treatment conditions:

Plate 1

DMSO

olaparib 20

pembro 10

ATXi 0.5 uM

PERKi 0.5 uM

STINGa 0.5 uM

WEE1i 5 uM

PARPi + PD-1

PARPi + ATXi

PARPi + PERKi

PARPi + STINGa

PD-1i + STINGa

ATXi + STINGa

PARPi + PD1-i + STINGa

PARPi + ATXi + STINGa

Treatment plan:

DAY6 :

Cells were treated with live-or-dead stain (515; 1:1000) before fixing.

Stored in PBS

Next week cells stained with CK7 - 555 + CD45 - 647 + Hoechst

Omentum gel | 17.7 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.141
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100 U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02
